1.name: The Nexus of Echoes — Central Chamber
1.description: A vast circular chamber of polished obsidian. Six archways radiate outward, each shimmering with a different colored light. The ceiling is lost in darkness above, but faint stars seem to drift there. A groove in the floor spirals inward — something round passed through here recently.

interactables.description: A smooth circular groove spirals across the obsidian floor. Whatever made it was rolling fast and with purpose.

2.name: Gateway Chamber — North
2.description: The northern archway pulses with golden light. Beyond it, you glimpse rolling green hills and castle spires. A sign reads: 'The Shattered Crown — Realm of Sword and Sorcery.'

interactables.description: The archway hums with magical energy. Step through to enter The Shattered Crown.

3.name: Gateway Chamber — South
3.description: The southern archway crackles with blue-white electricity. Neon signs and holographic advertisements flicker beyond. A sign reads: 'Neon Grid — The Digital Frontier.'

interactables.description: Digital static dances across the threshold. Step through to enter Neon Grid.

4.name: Gateway Chamber — East
4.description: The eastern archway drips with perpetual rain. Street lamps and saxophone music drift through. A sign reads: 'Midnight Rain — Where Shadows Have Secrets.'

interactables.description: Rain falls just beyond the threshold but never crosses it. Step through to enter Midnight Rain.

5.name: Gateway Chamber — West
5.description: The western archway glows with orange firelight. Explosions and gunfire echo faintly. A sign reads: 'Blood & Chrome — No Pain, No Gain.'

interactables.description: Heat radiates from beyond the threshold. Step through to enter Blood & Chrome.

6.name: Gateway Chamber — Upper
6.description: The upward archway floats impossibly overhead, reached by crystalline steps that materialize as you approach. Cherry blossoms drift through. A sign reads: 'The Floating Shards — Path of the Ascendant.'

interactables.description: The crystalline steps shimmer with inner light. Step up to enter The Floating Shards.

7.name: Gateway Chamber — Northeast
7.description: The northeastern archway is carved from ancient stone, torchlit and echoing with distant crowds. A sign reads: 'The Forgotten Epoch — Where History Lives.'

interactables.description: The smell of dust and iron drifts through. Step through to enter The Forgotten Epoch.

8.name: The Training Hall
8.description: A spacious hall with practice dummies, weapon racks, and sparring circles. Instructor Vex stands ready to help newcomers learn the basics of combat.

interactables.description: Straw-stuffed practice dummies stand in a row. They look well-beaten.
A rack of basic training weapons — wooden swords, blunt daggers, practice staves.

9.name: The Global Bazaar
9.description: A bustling marketplace where items from all realms converge. Merchant stalls line the walls, each displaying wares from a different zone. A large notice board dominates the center.

interactables.description: The notice board is covered in player-posted notes and trade requests. [Server feature — coming soon]

10.name: The Armory
10.description: Racks of weapons and armor line the walls. The Armorer, a scarred dwarf named Grindstone, polishes a blade behind the counter.

interactables.description: Glass cases display fine weapons and armor pieces, each with a price tag.

11.name: The Apothecary
11.description: Shelves of bubbling potions, dried herbs, and strange crystals fill this cramped shop. Madame Veil tends a cauldron in the corner, her eyes never quite meeting yours.

interactables.description: The cauldron bubbles with a luminescent green liquid. It smells like mint and regret.

12.name: The Courier's Post
12.description: A busy office where messages and packages are sorted. Courier Dash, a wiry halfling, manages deliveries between zones.

interactables.description: Stacks of wrapped parcels await delivery. Some are addressed to names you don't recognize.

13.name: The Lore Keeper's Study
13.description: Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves surround a cluttered desk. The Lore Keeper, an ancient elf named Syllith, pores over a massive tome.

interactables.description: The tome is written in a dozen languages simultaneously. Syllith seems to read them all at once.

14.name: The Rest Hall
14.description: Comfortable beds and warm hearths fill this communal resting area. Travelers from all zones gather here to share stories and recover.

interactables.description: The beds look inviting. A good rest might restore your strength.

15.name: The Archive
15.description: A quiet wing of the Lore Keeper's domain. Ancient scrolls and maps are preserved behind glass. One map shows all six zones connected by glowing lines to this central hub.

interactables.description: The map shows the Nexus at the center with six paths radiating outward. A seventh path is drawn in faint pencil, leading... down?

16.name: The Bounty Board
16.description: A large wooden board covered in pinned notices. Each one describes a task that needs doing — creatures to slay, items to retrieve, messages to deliver.

interactables.description: Various bounties are posted here. Talk to the Bounty Master for details.

17.name: The Sparring Pit
17.description: A sunken arena where combatants can test their skills against training constructs. The walls are scorched and dented from countless bouts.

interactables.description: A mechanical training construct stands dormant in the center, waiting to be activated.

18.name: The Wanderer's Tavern
18.description: A cozy tavern tucked into a corner of the Nexus. The barkeep, a jovial orc named Tumble, serves drinks that glow in strange colors.

interactables.description: The menu lists drinks from every zone: Dragonfire Ale, Neon Fizz, Noir Coffee, Napalm Shot, Sakura Tea, and Gladiator's Mead.

19.name: The Back Room
19.description: A dimly lit room behind the tavern. A hooded figure sits alone at a table, shuffling cards. They look up as you enter.

interactables.description: The cards have strange symbols on them — not any suit you recognize. The figure seems to be waiting for someone to play.

20.name: The Shrine of Echoes
20.description: A small, peaceful alcove with a glowing crystal at its center. Touching it seems to restore vitality. Faint whispers of past travelers linger in the air.

interactables.description: The crystal pulses with warm light. You feel your wounds beginning to close.

21.name: The Crafting Bench
21.description: A sturdy workbench with tools for combining materials. A sign reads: 'Combine items here. Place two items and see what happens.'

interactables.description: The workbench has slots for two items. Use 'combine <item1> <item2>' to attempt crafting.

22.name: The Storage Vault
22.description: Personal storage lockers line the walls. Each one is keyed to a specific traveler. Your locker glows faintly, recognizing your presence.

interactables.description: Your personal storage. [Feature coming soon — store items between sessions]

23.name: The Notice Wall
23.description: A wall covered in small notes left by other travelers. Some are helpful tips, others are cryptic warnings, and a few are just jokes.

interactables.description: You read a few notes: 'Beware the third statue.' 'The safe code is a year.' 'Don't trust the cards.' [Player notes — server feature]

24.name: The Meditation Garden
24.description: A tranquil garden with bonsai trees, a small pond, and stepping stones. The air smells of lavender. Time seems to move differently here.

interactables.description: Koi fish swim in lazy circles. The water is perfectly clear.

25.name: The Observatory
25.description: A domed room with a massive telescope pointed at the ceiling — which appears to be open sky despite being underground. Stars wheel overhead in patterns that don't match any known constellation.

interactables.description: Through the telescope you see... the marble. Just for an instant. Rolling across a field of stars. Then it's gone.

1001.name: King's Road — Southern Gate
1001.description: A crumbling stone archway marks the entrance to the realm of the Shattered Crown. The road stretches north through rolling green hills dotted with wildflowers. A faded signpost points in several directions. The air smells of grass and distant smoke.

interactables.description: The signpost reads: North — Thornhold Village. East — Farmer's Fields. West — The Old Forest. The paint is peeling.

1002.name: King's Road — Rolling Hills
1002.description: The road winds between grassy hills. Wildflowers sway in a gentle breeze. To the east, you can see farmland. To the west, the treeline of a dark forest looms.

1003.name: King's Road — Crossroads
1003.description: A stone marker stands at the intersection of several paths. The main road continues north toward a village. A narrower path leads east toward distant mountains, and another west into dense forest.

interactables.description: The stone marker has directions carved into it, but someone has scratched 'TURN BACK' over most of them.

1004.name: Thornhold Village — South End
1004.description: The village of Thornhold begins here. Thatched-roof cottages line a muddy street. A blacksmith's hammer rings from the east. Villagers eye you with cautious curiosity.

1005.name: Thornhold Village — Square
1005.description: The village square is dominated by a dry fountain and a notice board. A tavern sits to the west, and the road continues north toward the castle ruins.

interactables.description: The fountain is dry. A circular dent in the basin suggests something heavy rolled through here recently, cracking the stone.
Bounties posted: 'Wolf Pack — 3 wolves terrorizing farms. Reward: 30 coin.' 'Missing Herbs — Herbalist seeks Moonpetal flowers.'

1006.name: Farmer's Fields — West Pasture
1006.description: A fenced pasture where sheep graze nervously. The fence has been broken in several places — something has been getting in at night.

interactables.description: The fence posts are snapped clean. Claw marks score the wood. Wolf damage.

1007.name: Farmer's Fields — East Pasture
1007.description: More farmland stretches east. Old Farmer Giles tends his remaining sheep here, looking haggard and worried.

1008.name: Farmer's Fields — Barn
1008.description: A large red barn with a sagging roof. Hay bales are stacked inside, and the smell of livestock is strong. Something rustles in the loft above.

interactables.description: The hay loft is accessible by a rickety ladder. You hear squeaking from up there.

1009.name: Farmer's Fields — Orchard
1009.description: Rows of apple trees stretch in neat lines. Some have been knocked over — something large barreled through here. A trail of crushed apples leads north.

interactables.description: The trail of destruction is fresh. Whatever did this was heavy, fast, and didn't care about obstacles.

1010.name: The Old Forest — Edge
1010.description: Ancient oaks tower overhead, their canopy blocking most sunlight. The air is cool and damp. A narrow path leads deeper into the gloom.

1011.name: The Old Forest — Mossy Path
1011.description: Thick moss covers everything — the ground, the trees, even the air feels green. The path splits ahead.

1012.name: The Old Forest — Hollow
1012.description: A massive hollow tree dominates this clearing. Its interior is large enough to shelter in. Strange mushrooms grow in a ring around it.

interactables.description: The mushrooms glow faintly blue. The hollow tree smells of earth and age. Something lived here once — something large.

1013.name: The Old Forest — Deep Woods
1013.description: The trees press close here, branches interlocking overhead like skeletal fingers. Visibility drops to a few meters. You hear things moving in the undergrowth.

1014.name: The Old Forest — Stream Crossing
1014.description: A shallow stream cuts through the forest floor. Stepping stones provide a path across. The water is clear but moves with unnatural speed.

1015.name: The Old Forest — Witch's Clearing
1015.description: A small clearing with a ruined cottage. Herbs hang drying from the eaves and a cauldron sits cold over an unlit fire. The wandering herbalist works here.

1016.name: The Old Forest — Spider Nest
1016.description: Thick webs coat every surface. Cocooned shapes hang from branches — some disturbingly humanoid in size. The air vibrates with the movement of many legs.

1017.name: The Old Forest — Waterfall Grotto
1017.description: The stream ends at a small waterfall cascading into a crystal-clear pool. Behind the waterfall, you can see the dark mouth of a cave.

interactables.description: The cave behind the waterfall is narrow but passable. Cool mist sprays your face.

1018.name: The Old Forest — Hidden Cave
1018.description: A damp cave behind the waterfall. Glowing crystals provide dim light. In the back, a stone chest sits undisturbed — covered in dust but for a single circular track across its lid.

interactables.description: The circular track across the chest's lid is smooth and recent. Something round sat here, then rolled away. The chest itself is empty.

1019.name: The Old Forest — Treant Grove
1019.description: The trees here are impossibly old and impossibly large. Some of them move. Slowly, but they move. Dark sap weeps from twisted bark.

1020.name: Mountain Path — Foothills
1020.description: The terrain rises sharply as the road climbs toward distant peaks. Loose stones make the footing treacherous. The air thins slightly.

1021.name: Mountain Path — Switchback
1021.description: The path zigzags up the mountainside. Each turn reveals a broader view of the kingdom below — or what remains of it.

1022.name: Mountain Path — Goblin Camp
1022.description: A crude camp of hide tents and smoldering cookfires. Goblin scouts patrol the perimeter. They've been raiding travelers on this road.

1023.name: Mountain Path — Cliff Face
1023.description: The path narrows to a ledge along a sheer cliff. Wind howls past, threatening to push you off. Far below, the forest is a green carpet.

1024.name: Mountain Path — Cave Entrance
1024.description: A large cave mouth yawns in the mountainside. The smell of rot and the sound of heavy breathing drift from within.

interactables.description: The cave is dark and the breathing is rhythmic. Something large sleeps within — or pretends to.

1025.name: Thornhold — Blacksmith
1025.description: Heat radiates from the forge. Blacksmith Hanna works tirelessly, her hammer striking sparks from glowing metal. Weapons and armor hang on display.

1026.name: Thornhold — Chapel
1026.description: A small stone chapel with stained glass windows depicting a crowned figure. The pews are dusty — few pray here anymore. A donation box sits by the door.

interactables.description: The stained glass shows a king holding a crown that appears to be cracking. Prophetic, perhaps.
The donation box is empty. It has been for a long time.

1027.name: Thornhold — Tavern
1027.description: The Broken Crown tavern is warm and smoky. A few locals nurse their drinks in silence. The barkeep polishes a glass that will never be clean.

interactables.description: The barkeep grunts. 'Ale's a coin. Information's two.'

1028.name: Thornhold — Market Stalls
1028.description: A row of market stalls selling basic goods — bread, rope, torches, and the occasional questionable potion. A shady merchant beckons from the corner.

1029.name: Thornhold — Back Alley
1029.description: A narrow alley behind the market stalls. Rats scurry in the shadows. A locked door leads to what might be a smuggler's den.

interactables.description: The door is reinforced with iron bands. A keyhole suggests it can be opened, but you don't have the key.

1030.name: Castle Approach
1030.description: The road ends at the ruins of a once-magnificent castle. Towers have crumbled, walls have fallen, but the main keep still stands — barely. The gates hang open.

1031.name: Castle — Outer Courtyard
1031.description: A courtyard choked with weeds and rubble. A dry moat surrounds the inner keep. A drawbridge, half-rotted, spans the gap.

interactables.description: The drawbridge creaks ominously but holds your weight. The moat below is dry and full of bones.

1032.name: Castle — Inner Courtyard
1032.description: Beyond the drawbridge, the inner courtyard is eerily quiet. Four stone statues stand at compass points around a central pedestal. The keep entrance looms to the north.

interactables.description: Four statues of knights, each facing a different direction. The pedestal in the center has a circular groove — something rested here once. The statues can be rotated.
A smooth circular depression in the stone. The marble was here. It rested. Then it moved on.

1033.name: Castle — Great Hall
1033.description: The keep's great hall is vast and cold. Tattered banners hang from the ceiling. At the far end, a massive throne sits on a raised dais. Dust motes drift in shafts of light from broken windows.

interactables.description: The throne is carved from a single piece of black stone. It radiates cold. If the statues outside were aligned correctly, something might happen here.

1034.name: Castle — East Tower Base
1034.description: The base of the eastern tower. A spiral staircase leads up, though several steps are missing. Gargoyles perch on the walls above.

1035.name: Castle — West Tower Base
1035.description: The western tower's base is flooded knee-deep. Something glints beneath the murky water. The stairs up are intact but slippery.

interactables.description: You reach into the cold water and pull out... a tarnished ring with an inscription.

1036.name: Castle — Armory
1036.description: The castle's old armory. Most weapons have rusted to nothing, but a few pieces remain serviceable. Weapon racks line the walls.

1037.name: Castle — Library
1037.description: Shelves of rotting books fill this room. Most are illegible, but a few tomes remain intact. A reading desk holds an open journal.

interactables.description: The journal's last entry reads: 'The statues must face inward. All four. Only then will the throne reveal the passage. I pray no one follows what went below.'

1038.name: Castle — Throne Secret Passage
1038.description: Behind the shifted throne, a narrow passage descends into darkness. The walls are smooth — unnaturally so. A circular groove runs along the floor, leading down.

interactables.description: The groove in the floor is perfectly circular and polished smooth by repeated passage. The marble came through here. Many times.

1039.name: Castle — Dungeon
1039.description: Below the great hall, damp cells line a corridor. Most are empty, but one contains a skeleton still chained to the wall. It clutches something in its bony hand.

interactables.description: The skeleton's hand holds a small iron key. It comes free with a dry snap.

1040.name: Castle — East Tower Top
1040.description: The top of the eastern tower offers a panoramic view. You can see all six zones from here — shimmering portals in the distance. A telescope is mounted on a tripod.

interactables.description: Through the telescope you can see... a tiny sphere rolling across a distant field. It pauses, as if aware of being watched, then accelerates out of sight.

1041.name: Castle — West Tower Top
1041.description: The western tower's peak is a rookery. Ravens nest here, watching with intelligent eyes. One has a small scroll tied to its leg.

interactables.description: The scroll reads: 'Follow the compass where it doesn't point. That's where truth hides.' Cryptic and probably useless.

1042.name: Castle — Crypt Entrance
1042.description: Stone steps descend into a crypt beneath the castle. The air is thick with the smell of old death. Torches on the walls flicker with unnatural blue flame.

1043.name: Castle — Crypt
1043.description: Stone sarcophagi line the walls of this underground chamber. Names of forgotten kings are carved into each one. The far wall has collapsed, revealing a natural cavern beyond.

interactables.description: The names are too worn to read clearly. One sarcophagus has been opened — it's empty inside, with a circular indentation in the velvet lining.

1044.name: Castle — Hidden Cavern
1044.description: A natural cavern connected to the crypt. Stalactites drip mineral water. In the center, a natural stone bridge spans a bottomless chasm. On the far side, something glows.

interactables.description: The bridge is narrow but solid. The glow on the far side pulses rhythmically — like a heartbeat.

1045.name: Castle — The Marble's Rest
1045.description: A small chamber at the end of the cavern. A stone pedestal sits in the center with a perfectly spherical indentation. The marble was here — recently. A faint warmth lingers. A note is pinned to the wall.

interactables.description: The indentation is warm to the touch. The marble rested here, perhaps for years. But it sensed you coming and fled.
The note reads: 'You're getting closer. But I have five more places to be. — M'

2001.name: Gateway South
2001.description: The entrance to the Neon Grid. A massive blast door stands to the south, leading back to the hub. The neon lights reflect off the wet pavement.

2002.name: Neon Street 2
2002.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2003.name: Neon Street 3
2003.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2004.name: Neon Street 4
2004.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2005.name: Neon Street 5
2005.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2006.name: Neon Street 6
2006.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here. You notice a perfectly circular groove carved into the concrete wall, as if a sphere rolled along it at high speed.

2007.name: Neon Street 7
2007.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2008.name: Neon Street 8
2008.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2009.name: Neon Street 9
2009.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2010.name: Neon Street 10
2010.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2011.name: Doc Splice's Clinic
2011.description: A sterile-smelling room filled with surgical tools and cybernetic parts.

2012.name: Neon Street 12
2012.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2013.name: Neon Street 13
2013.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2014.name: Neon Street 14
2014.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2015.name: Neon Street 15
2015.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2016.name: Neon Street 16
2016.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here. A puddle of neon-lit water ripples, but you swear you saw a perfect sphere roll through it without leaving a reflection.

2017.name: Neon Street 17
2017.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2018.name: Neon Street 18
2018.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2019.name: Neon Street 19
2019.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2020.name: Neon Street 20
2020.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2021.name: Neon Mama's Bar
2021.description: A loud, crowded dive bar. The floor has a perfectly circular dent in it, as if a heavy marble was dropped.

2022.name: Neon Street 22
2022.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2023.name: Neon Street 23
2023.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2024.name: Neon Street 24
2024.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2025.name: Neon Street 25
2025.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2026.name: Neon Street 26
2026.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2027.name: Neon Street 27
2027.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2028.name: Neon Street 28
2028.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2029.name: Neon Street 29
2029.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2030.name: Neon Street 30
2030.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2031.name: Hacker Den
2031.description: A dark room lit only by the glow of dozens of monitors.

2032.name: Neon Street 32
2032.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2033.name: Neon Street 33
2033.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2034.name: Neon Street 34
2034.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2035.name: Neon Street 35
2035.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2036.name: Neon Street 36
2036.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2037.name: Neon Street 37
2037.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2038.name: Neon Street 38
2038.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2039.name: Neon Street 39
2039.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2040.name: Neon Street 40
2040.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2041.name: Fixer's Corner
2041.description: A relatively quiet alleyway where shady deals go down.

2042.name: Neon Street 42
2042.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2043.name: Neon Street 43
2043.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2044.name: Neon Street 44
2044.description: A grimy street illuminated by flickering neon signs. The rain never seems to stop here.

2045.name: Corporate Vault Entrance
2045.description: A pristine white hallway leading to a massive vault door. There is a biometric scanner next to the door.

interactables.description: A retinal scanner. It requires a valid eye to open the vault.

3001.name: Rain-Soaked Street Corner
3001.description: The rain falls relentlessly, pooling in the gutters. A flickering streetlamp casts long shadows. Something rolled through the rain, leaving a dry trail on wet pavement.

3002.name: Dark Alleyway
3002.description: A narrow alley filled with trash cans and the smell of decay.

3003.name: PI Office
3003.description: A dusty office with a desk, a filing cabinet, and a safe in the corner. The window blinds are drawn.

interactables.description: A messy desk with papers scattered about. A calendar is circled on the year 1945.
A heavy iron safe. It requires a 4-digit combination.

3004.name: Neon-Lit Street
3004.description: Neon signs reflect in the puddles. The sound of jazz drifts from a nearby club.

3005.name: The Blue Note Jazz Club
3005.description: A smoky club filled with the smooth sounds of a saxophone. Patrons sip drinks in dimly lit booths.

3006.name: Diner Exterior
3006.description: A classic diner with a glowing 'OPEN' sign. The smell of coffee and grease fills the air.

3007.name: Mama Rosa's Diner
3007.description: A cozy diner with red vinyl booths and a checkered floor.

3008.name: Abandoned Warehouse District
3008.description: Large, empty warehouses loom in the darkness. The rain seems even colder here.

3009.name: Warehouse 13
3009.description: Dusty crates are stacked high. Shadows dance on the walls.

3010.name: The Docks
3010.description: The smell of salt and dead fish. Waves crash against the wooden pilings.

3011.name: Smuggler's Cove
3011.description: A hidden section of the docks where illicit goods are unloaded.

3012.name: Sewer Entrance
3012.description: A foul-smelling grate leading down into the city's underbelly.

3013.name: Sewer Tunnels
3013.description: Damp, echoing tunnels filled with murky water.

3014.name: Deep Sewers
3014.description: The water is deeper here, and the smell is unbearable.

3015.name: Hidden Speakeasy Entrance
3015.description: A heavy iron door in the sewers. A sliding peephole is visible.

3016.name: The Blind Tiger Speakeasy
3016.description: A lavish underground bar. People are drinking and gambling.

3017.name: Back Room Casino
3017.description: High-stakes poker games are in progress. The air is thick with cigar smoke.

3018.name: The Vault
3018.description: A secure vault room. The heavy door is slightly ajar.

3019.name: Police Station Steps
3019.description: Imposing stone steps leading up to the precinct.

3020.name: Precinct Lobby
3020.description: A busy lobby with ringing phones and shouting officers.

3021.name: Interrogation Room
3021.description: A stark room with a single table and a bright light.

3022.name: Evidence Room
3022.description: Shelves filled with tagged items. It looks like some things are missing.

3023.name: Captain's Office
3023.description: A plush office. The captain is nowhere to be seen.

3024.name: City Street 1
3024.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3025.name: City Street 2
3025.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3026.name: City Street 3
3026.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3027.name: City Street 4
3027.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3028.name: City Street 5
3028.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3029.name: City Street 6
3029.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3030.name: City Street 7
3030.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3031.name: City Street 8
3031.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3032.name: City Street 9
3032.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3033.name: City Street 10
3033.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

3034.name: City Street 11
3034.description: Another rain-slicked street in the sprawling city.

5001.name: Gateway Upper
5001.description: The entrance to the Floating Shards. A magical portal leads down to the hub.

interactables.description: A swirling vortex of energy leading down.

5006.name: Floating Shard 6
5006.description: You are standing on a floating island in the sky. Bamboo sways in the wind, and cherry blossoms drift through the air. A sphere of perfect clarity bounced between the floating shards, leaving ripples in the clouds.

interactables.description: Faint ripples in the cloud layer, as if a perfect sphere passed through here.
